Dialog.name: MND_MISSING_CAT_REACT00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a cat that looks pretty nonchalant.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_MISSING_CAT_REACT01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a cat that looks like it's scowling.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_MISSING_CAT_REACT02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a cat that looks really puzzled.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_MISSING_CAT_REACT03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a cat that looks like it might claw me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_MISSING_CAT_REACT04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a cat that looks to be at peace.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_MISSING_CAT_REACT05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a cat that looks nice and docile.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_MISSING_CAT_REACT06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a cat that looks like it might cry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_CAT_RESCUE_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5122 0 0}Huh? There's a kitty in a place like this...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_CAT_RESCUE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}A-Anyway, we need to protect it. Please come back to the entrance immediately![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_GO_ENTRANCE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Understood. I'll wait for you at the entrance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_RESERVE_MEMBE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}In that case, please stand by until an escort arrives at your location.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_SANADA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}I'm heading out now. Just wait, I'll be there soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_MITURU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}I'll go, then. Just hold on for a little longer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_AEGIS_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6117 0 0}Please wait there. I will arrive shortly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_AMADA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7119 0 0}Would you like me to go? Don't worry, I'll be there in a jiffy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_YUKARI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Sorry to keep you waiting. You can leave the rest to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_JUNPEI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2029 0 0}Alright, I'm here! Let me take care of this—you get goin'![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_SANADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3023 0 0}Sorry for the wait. Just leave the rest to me. I'll keep it safe.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_MITURU_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}Apologies for the delay. I'll make sure this cat is escorted back safely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_AEGIS_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6020 0 0}Thank you for your patience. Please let me handle this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_AMADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7116 0 0}Whew, sorry for making you wait. I'll make sure this kitty gets back safe and sound![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_ARAGAKI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9010 0 0}Yo, sorry 'bout the wait. I'll handle it from here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_KOROMARU_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}Oh, I think Koro-chan's volunteering to go! Well then, we're counting on you, Koro-chan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RESCUE_KOROMARU_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Looks like he made it there safely. Well done, Koro-chan! Please bring the kitty back quickly![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_MISSING_CAT_REWARD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The cat offered me something it was holding[n]in its mouth. Maybe it's a thank-you gift?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_MISSING_CAT_REWARD_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...It's a bit damp, but I[n]think I could still use it.[n]{f 1 1}
